title: Attributable active relationship lifecycle
description: Transfer and refund/reversal links have attributable active/retired history and enforce exclusive active roles. Each active transfer leg belongs to exactly one active transfer and no active refund; each active refund credit belongs in full to exactly one original and no active transfer; an original may have multiple active refund credits only while their cumulative magnitude is at most the original magnitude and may not itself be a refund credit or transfer leg. Only active Canonical Transactions may receive a new active link. Voiding or superseding a linked transaction atomically retires its active links; no relationship moves silently to a replacement. Revocation/replacement requires an explicit reason and revalidates role, cardinality, amount, account, currency, sign, and lifecycle rules before atomic activation.
